name: superteam
description: V4.7 main-session-as-orchestrator plus the V4.7.1 closeout fixes: active-subagent window now opens only for superteam:* specialists (non-SuperTeam subagents no longer give the main session a write bypass), corrupt/unknown-schema mode.json triggers a loud warning instead of a silent fall-through, and the missing /superteam:bypass slash command is now provided.
